spruce-health.name: Spruce Health

Effectively unlimited usage with no per-text, per-call, or per-fax charges
Available on web, iOS, and Android
HIPAA BAA included on both pricing tiers

SMS texting requires a one-time $19.50 registration fee
API access and integrations require the higher-priced Communicator plan

Founding year and company size are not disclosed on the site

faqs.question: What's included in the cheapest cloud plan?

kill-bill.name: Kill Bill
kill-bill.short_description: Open-source subscription billing and payments platform you self-host for full data control.

features.description: Supports usage-based, prepaid, postpaid, and multi-tenant subscription models.
features.title: Subscription billing engine

features.description: Native plugin support for Stripe, Adyen, PayPal, Braintree, and other gateways.
features.title: Payment gateway plugins

features.description: A back-office web interface for managing subscriptions and payments.
features.title: Kaui admin UI

features.description: An extensible framework for building custom integrations and modifications.
features.title: Plugin architecture

features.description: Connects to tax and compliance engines such as Avalara and Vertex.
features.title: Tax engine integrations

features.description: Deploys via Docker or Kubernetes in your own infrastructure, avoiding SaaS lock-in.
features.title: Self-hosted deployment

pros: Core platform is free and fully open source under Apache 2.0
Full data ownership since it runs in your own infrastructure
No per-transaction or revenue-percentage fees
Long track record, in production for over 15 years
Plugin architecture supports many payment gateways and tax engines
cons: Requires engineering resources to deploy, operate, and maintain
No official low-code hosted option from the core project itself (managed hosting is via third parties)
Enterprise accelerator (Aviate) is a separate proprietary offering, not part of the free core

faqs.answer: Yes, the core Kill Bill platform is open source under the Apache License 2.0 and free to self-host.
faqs.question: Is Kill Bill free?

faqs.answer: Kill Bill is designed to be self-hosted via Docker or Kubernetes; third-party providers such as ChaChing offer managed hosting.
faqs.question: Do I need to host Kill Bill myself?

faqs.answer: It has native plugin support for Stripe, Adyen, PayPal, Braintree, and other gateways.
faqs.question: What payment gateways does Kill Bill support?

faqs.answer: The codebase is primarily Java, with smaller portions in JavaScript, CSS, Shell, and PL/pgSQL.
faqs.question: What language is Kill Bill written in?
